since_last: 27% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads -0.07%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 27% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.83% · BTC -1.14% · Gold +0.40% · Nasdaq100 -1.69%. 27% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at -0.07%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -0.07%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.12%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -12.10%
cards.body: Leaders: ZS +2.44%, PANW +2.12%, CSCO +1.82%, LEU +1.50%, NET +1.43%. Laggards: ISRG -12.10%, META -5.56%, PUBM -5.50%, SPCX -5.48%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.48% at $123.93
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.48% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
